Pharmacist-led surveillance triage

Massachusetts drug supply intelligence

A screening dashboard for newly detected reports, alerts, publications, and source updates. Open the linked source before using any item operationally.

Counts describe newly detected source items, not prevalence.

Interpretation note

Automated labels support triage. A signal may reflect a new publication, a revised webpage, or a repeated topic rather than a new change in the street supply.

Priority is assigned from record metadata and relevance scoring. Cross-source labels indicate corroborating source mentions, not independent laboratory confirmation.

For informational surveillance use. Review dates, methods, geography, denominators, and source limitations before citing an item.
